text.title: Strategy Analysis — Gap Analysis — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are current + future specs current and is remediation capacity available?

branch.when: specs_current == true AND remediation_capacity == true AND no_existing_gap_analysis

example.trace: ENG-42 → specs current → capacity ok → produce new gap analysis with severity + owners
